name: System Prompt Generation for Phase and Posture
description: Generates system prompts tailored to different phases (understand, challenge, synthesize) and postures (adversarial, contrarian, critic, skeptic, collaborator) for an AI-assisted problem clarification workflow. Formats problem models into human-readable text and constructs phase-specific prompts with JSON instruction blocks.

types.name: Posture
types.description: Analytical postures for challenge phase (imported from .models)

functions.name: _format_problem_model
functions.description: Formats a ProblemModel into a human-readable multi-line string representation. Iterates through model fields (system_description, stakeholders, dependencies, assumptions, boundaries, history, success_shape, acceptance_criteria, failure_modes) and formats non-empty ones with titles and bullet points.

inputs.name: model
inputs.description: The problem model instance to format

error_cases.name: AttributeError
error_cases.condition: If model lacks expected attributes during getattr() calls

postconditions: Returns '(No information gathered yet)' if all model fields are empty
Returns formatted multi-line string with field names as headers and items as bullet points if any field has data
System description appears first if present
Failure modes are formatted by extracting 'description' key or converting to string

functions.name: _understand_prompt
functions.description: Generates a system prompt for the 'understand' phase. Creates an interviewer persona that asks questions to build a complete mental model of the problem across 7 dimensions (system context, stakes, history, dependencies, boundaries, assumptions, acceptance criteria).

inputs.name: problem_model
inputs.description: Current state of the problem model

postconditions: Returns a multi-line string containing interviewer instructions
Includes formatted problem model as 'Current understanding' section
Includes _JSON_INSTRUCTION template at the end

functions.name: _challenge_prompt
functions.description: Generates a system prompt for the 'challenge' phase with a specific analytical posture. Instructs the AI to find gaps, ambiguities, and hidden assumptions using the lens defined by the given posture.

inputs.name: problem_model
inputs.description: Current state of the problem model

error_cases.name: KeyError
error_cases.condition: If posture is not found in POSTURE_DESCRIPTIONS

preconditions: posture must be a valid key in POSTURE_DESCRIPTIONS dictionary
postconditions: Returns a multi-line string with challenge phase instructions
Includes the posture description from POSTURE_DESCRIPTIONS
Includes formatted problem model as 'Current problem model' section
Includes _JSON_INSTRUCTION template at the end

functions.name: _synthesize_prompt
functions.description: Generates a system prompt for the 'synthesize' phase. Instructs the AI to generate two artifacts: prompt.md (induced-understanding briefing) and constraints.yaml (structured constraint set) using specific delimiters.

inputs.name: problem_model
inputs.description: Current state of the problem model

postconditions: Returns a multi-line string with synthesis instructions
Specifies format for two artifacts with exact delimiters (--- PROMPT ---, --- CONSTRAINTS ---)
Includes formatted problem model as 'Problem model' section
Defines structure for prompt.md (7 sections) and constraints.yaml (constraint format)

functions.name: _revision_prompt
functions.description: Generates a prompt for artifact revision based on engineer feedback. Instructs the AI to regenerate both artifacts (prompt.md and constraints.yaml) incorporating the provided feedback.

inputs.name: feedback
inputs.description: Engineer's feedback on the generated artifacts

inputs.name: problem_model
inputs.description: Current state of the problem model

postconditions: Returns a multi-line string with revision instructions
Includes the feedback text
Includes formatted problem model as 'Problem model' section
Specifies same output format with delimiters as _synthesize_prompt

functions.name: get_system_prompt
functions.description: Main dispatcher function that returns the appropriate system prompt based on the current phase. Routes to _understand_prompt, _challenge_prompt, or _synthesize_prompt based on phase enum value.

inputs.name: problem_model
inputs.description: Current state of the problem model

inputs.name: posture
inputs.description: Required for challenge phase, ignored for other phases

error_cases.name: ValueError_MissingPosture
error_cases.condition: When phase is Phase.challenge and posture is None

error_data.message: Posture is required for challenge phase

error_cases.name: ValueError_UnknownPhase
error_cases.condition: When phase is not one of Phase.understand, Phase.challenge, or Phase.synthesize

preconditions: If phase is Phase.challenge, posture must not be None
postconditions: Returns appropriate prompt string for the given phase

functions.name: get_revision_prompt
functions.description: Public wrapper for _revision_prompt. Returns a prompt for revising artifacts based on feedback.

inputs.name: feedback
inputs.description: Engineer's feedback on the generated artifacts

inputs.name: problem_model
inputs.description: Current state of the problem model

postconditions: Returns revision prompt string identical to _revision_prompt output

functions.name: select_posture
functions.description: Selects an analytical posture based on priority: explicit override parameter, CONSTRAIN_POSTURE environment variable, or random selection from all Posture enum values. Validates environment variable value if present.

inputs.name: override
inputs.description: Explicit posture override; takes highest priority

error_cases.name: ValueError_InvalidEnvironmentPosture
error_cases.condition: When CONSTRAIN_POSTURE environment variable is set but contains invalid posture value

error_data.message: Invalid CONSTRAIN_POSTURE: '{env}'. Must be one of: {valid}

postconditions: If override is not None, returns override value
If override is None and CONSTRAIN_POSTURE env var is set to valid posture, returns that posture
If override is None and CONSTRAIN_POSTURE is not set, returns a randomly selected Posture
Random selection uses random.choice() with uniform distribution across all Posture values
side_effects: Uses random number generator for posture selection

invariants: POSTURE_DESCRIPTIONS contains exactly 5 entries mapping each Posture enum value to a description string
_JSON_INSTRUCTION is a constant multi-line string template included in multiple prompt types
All prompt functions return non-empty strings
Formatted problem models return '(No information gathered yet)' when all fields are empty
